name: personnel-hrm
description: Enterprise Personnel HRM — Advanced Workforce Management System

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
